phase_name: {{ ai.phase_name | default(ai.phase_title, true) | default(ai.phase) | default('Phase ' ~ ai.phase_idx | default(1)) }}
global_context_file: {{ ai.global_context_file | default('No Specific Project Global BluePrint Context File') }}

days.context_file: {{ ai.phase_context_file | default('No Specific Project Phase BluePrint Context File') }}

sub_tasks.agent: {{ day_item.get('subAgent') | default(task_item.assignee) | default(task_item.agent) | default(task_item.agent_role) | default('Coder') | lower }}
sub_tasks.desc: {{ day_item.get('subAgent') | default(task_item.assignee) | default(task_item.agent) | default(task_item.agent_role) | default('Coder') }} Agent: {{ task_item.task | default(task_item.desc) | default(task_item) | default('No description provided') }}
